meta.title: Terminator Fitness Club & Superium Fitness by Terminator
meta.description: Terminator Fitness Club & Superium Fitness by Terminator — more than a gym. Modern facilities, professional atmosphere, and 4 locations across Skopje.
meta.ogTitle: Terminator Fitness Club & Superium Fitness | More Than a Gym
meta.ogDescription: State-of-the-art equipment, a professional atmosphere, and a space where everyone can progress — from beginner to advanced.

hero.title: TERMINATOR FITNESS CLUB & SUPERIUM FITNESS BY TERMINATOR
hero.subtitle: More Than a Gym.
hero.intro: Terminator Fitness Club & Superium Fitness by Terminator is a place where training, discipline, and good energy come together. Modern equipped gyms, a professional atmosphere, and a space where everyone can progress — whether beginner or advanced.

equipment.title: Modern Equipment
equipment.description: Latest cardio and strength equipment for effective, safe training.

atmosphere.title: Professional Atmosphere
atmosphere.description: A motivating environment where discipline and positive energy are felt every day.

locations.title: Multiple Locations
locations.description: Four locations across Skopje — choose the one that suits you.

about.title: Who We Are
about.story: Terminator Fitness Club is a fitness brand created to offer a quality training space, motivating atmosphere, and modern conditions for exercising.
about.mission: Every member should feel welcome, motivated, and stronger day by day.
